problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Combining Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
